title: Xtra Juicy Australian Prawns Skewers
description: A salty and juicy Australian dish featuring large prawns, perfect for a romantic dinner, made keto-friendly and cooked to perfection in an air fryer.
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic powder, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the prawns to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread 3 prawns onto each skewer, leaving a small space between each prawn.
Place the skewers in the air fryer basket, leaving some space between each skewer.
Cook the prawns for 8 minutes, shaking the basket halfway through.
Remove the skewers from the air fryer and brush with lemon juice.
Sprinkle chopped parsley over the prawns and serve immediately.
